propositions: The long-running auto-lander loop service is containerized and deployed as a single docker-compose instance on the existing Gerrit box.
The service logs to its own service logs and must never write to session_log.
Credentials are provisioned via an SSM token and Gerrit capabilities (rebaseOnBehalfOfUploader plus submit ACL) without IAM changes.
Failure modes (hang, error, stuck-state, lander_down) are made loudly visible through metrics and alarms including autolander_errors and a read-only HTTP status endpoint.
A heartbeat timestamp written each 15s poll drives liveness, with lander_down triggered at heartbeat_age_s over 90s.
Crash-safe restart is guaranteed via flock single-writer, autoheal restart, emergency-stop sentinel, drain-on-SIGTERM recovery record, and idempotency.
